title: Trader Joe's items for easy meals and desserts, from recipe developer
excerpt: As a recipe developer, I shop at Trader Joe's for things to make easy meals and desserts. I always buy the store's super-firm tofu and Zhoug sauce.
content_html:
As a freelance recipe developer and food writer of over 15 years, I love browsing the aisles of Trader Joe's for new items I can add to my weekly rotation.

I'm always on the lookout for ingredients that can add a last-minute punch of flavor to any dish — or be used for a proper "girl dinner," since sometimes, after a long day of recipe development, the last thing I want to do is cook an elaborate meal.

Here are a few items that always make their way into my cart.

Trader Joe's super-firm tofu is one of my favorite ways to add protein to a meal.

As a vegetarian, I'm always looking for a good source of protein. Trader Joe's super-firm tofu is packed with flavor and makes for the perfect base for a quick stir-fry or air-fried meal.

To get it extra-crispy, I chop up the tofu, toss it with salt, pepper, rice flour, and cornstarch, and air-fry it at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.

Then, I toss it with a simple sauce for an easy protein-packed meal.

I love Trader Joe's Zhoug sauce.

Zhoug sauce is a Yemeni condiment that packs a little heat and a ton of flavor. I find it similar to a chimichurri or a green chutney in flavor.

It's fresh, bright, and herbaceous, making it great for a sandwich spread, a marinade, or for tossing with veggies.

When I'm making dessert, I reach for Trader Joe's Belgian butter waffle cookies.

I love a flexible ingredient, and Trader Joe's buttery waffle cookies come in clutch when putting together a quick dessert.

I like to serve it with ice cream, on a dessert board with chocolate fudge and fresh fruit, as a side for a latte or coffee, or make mini ice-cream sandwiches with it.

They're super versatile — and equally delicious on their own.

Trader Joe's vegetable masala burgers are surprisingly versatile.

Trader Joe's vegetable masala burgers are a staple in my house.

The burgers are mildly spiced, made with real veggies, and work great chopped up in a morning omelet, quick veggie burger, or wrap.

They're also a great finger food for toddlers when cut up and paired with ketchup.

When I don't feel like cooking, I reach for Trader Joe's roti with Thai red curry.

Trader Joe's roti with Thai red curry is my go-to meal when I'm exhausted or don't have time to make a big meal.

The curry sauce is spicy and rich, and the roti is crispy and flaky. It's been a part of my "girl dinner" on many occasions.

I use freeze-dried fruit to add color to desserts and beverages.

I like to add color and flavor to homemade desserts using freeze-dried fruit. For example, to make pink powdered sugar, I blend Trader Joe's freeze-dried strawberries or raspberries with standard powdered sugar.

Sometimes, I also toss a handful into my lemonade, tea, or sparkling water for a quick infusion.

Trader Joe's semi-sweet chocolate chunks are great in cookies and brownies.

Whenever I want to make cookies with pools of chocolatey goodness, I reach for Trader Joe's semi-sweet chocolate chunks.

They're great for mixing into chocolate-chip cookie dough and brownies. I love that they're not too sweet and create a very well-balanced dessert.

I like to use Trader Joe's white queso dip to make nachos.

Trader Joe's white queso dip is mildly spicy and has that ooey-gooey texture that I love on nachos.

I just layer tortilla chips, beans, queso, and cheese on a foil-lined sheet pan, then pop it in the oven until it's melty, before adding my choice of toppings.

I always keep a container of Trader Joe's giant baked beans on hand.

Beans have really been having a renaissance lately, and I'm loving it.

I always grab a container of Trader Joe's giant baked beans in tomato sauce. The cannellini beans are creamy and rich, and make the perfect base for toast.

I heat up some crusty sourdough with olive oil, top it with the beans and a sprinkle of cheese, then pop it back in the toaster. Once warm, I like to top it with lemony arugula and enjoy.

Read next

Hetal Vasavada is a contributing writer for Business Insider.

  • Trader Joe's Diaries
  • Cooking

sentences.zh: Trader Joe's 的白奶酪酱略带辣味，口感粘稠，是我喜欢搭配玉米片的口感。

blocks.html_en: I just layer tortilla chips, beans, queso, and cheese on a foil-lined sheet pan, then pop it in the oven until it's melty, before adding my choice of toppings.

sentences.zh: 我只是将玉米片、豆子、奶酪和奶酪放在衬有箔纸的平底锅上，然后将其放入烤箱直至融化，然后添加我选择的配料。

blocks.html_en: I always keep a container of Trader Joe's giant baked beans on hand.

sentences.en: I always keep a container of Trader Joe's giant baked beans on hand.

blocks.html_en: Beans have really been having a renaissance lately, and I'm loving it.

sentences.en: Beans have really been having a renaissance lately, and I'm loving it.
sentences.zh: 豆子最近确实复兴了，我很喜欢它。

blocks.html_en: I always grab a container of Trader Joe's giant baked beans in tomato sauce. The cannellini beans are creamy and rich, and make the perfect base for toast.

sentences.en: I always grab a container of Trader Joe's giant baked beans in tomato sauce.
sentences.zh: 我总是拿一盒 Trader Joe’s 的巨型番茄酱烤豆。

sentences.en: The cannellini beans are creamy and rich, and make the perfect base for toast.
sentences.zh: 意大利卷豆奶油味浓郁，是吐司的完美底料。

blocks.html_en: I heat up some crusty sourdough with olive oil, top it with the beans and a sprinkle of cheese, then pop it back in the toaster. Once warm, I like to top it with lemony arugula and enjoy.

sentences.en: I heat up some crusty sourdough with olive oil, top it with the beans and a sprinkle of cheese, then pop it back in the toaster.
sentences.zh: 我用橄榄油加热一些硬皮酸面团，在上面放上豆子和少许奶酪，然后将其放回烤面包机中。

sentences.en: Once warm, I like to top it with lemony arugula and enjoy.
sentences.zh: 一旦温暖，我喜欢在上面放上柠檬芝麻菜并享用。

sentences.zh: 烹饪

content_html_zh:
作为一名拥有超过 15 年经验的自由菜谱开发者和美食作家，我喜欢浏览 Trader Joe's 的过道，寻找可以添加到每周轮换中的新商品。

我总是在寻找可以为任何菜肴添加最后一刻风味的食材，或者可以用于一顿合适的“女孩晚餐”，因为有时，经过一整天的食谱开发后，我最不想做的就是烹饪一顿精致的饭菜。

以下是一些总是进入我的购物车的商品。

Trader Joe 的超硬豆腐是我最喜欢的在膳食中添加蛋白质的方法之一。

作为一名素食主义者，我一直在寻找良好的蛋白质来源。 Trader Joe's 的超硬豆腐味道鲜美，是快速炒菜或气炸餐的完美底料。

为了让它格外酥脆，我把豆腐切碎，拌上盐、胡椒、米粉和玉米淀粉，然后在 400 华氏度的温度下空气炸 15 分钟。

然后，我将它与简单的酱汁一起拌匀，就成了一顿简单的富含蛋白质的饭菜。

我喜欢 Trader Joe's Zhoug 酱。

Zhoug酱是一种也门调味品，带有一点热量和大量的味道。 我发现它的味道类似于chimichurri或绿色酸辣酱。

它新鲜、明亮、草本，非常适合三明治酱、腌料或拌蔬菜。

当我做甜点时，我会伸手去拿Trader Joe's 比利时黄油华夫饼干。

我喜欢灵活的原料，而 Trader Joe's 的黄油华夫饼干在制作快速甜点时非常有用。

我喜欢将它与冰淇淋一起搭配，放在甜点板上，搭配巧克力软糖和新鲜水果，作为拿铁或咖啡的配菜，或者用它制作迷你冰淇淋三明治。

它们用途广泛，而且本身同样美味。

Trader Joe’s 的蔬菜马萨拉汉堡用途广泛。

Trader Joe’s 的蔬菜马萨拉汉堡是我家的主食。

这些汉堡味道温和，由真正的蔬菜制成，切碎后做成早餐煎蛋卷、速食素食汉堡或卷饼非常适合。

将它们切碎并与番茄酱搭配后，也是幼儿的绝佳手抓食物。

当我不想做饭时，我会去买 Trader Joe’s 的泰式红咖喱烤肉。

当我筋疲力尽或没有时间做一顿大餐时，Trader Joe's roti 配泰式红咖喱是我的首选。

咖喱酱辛辣浓郁，罗蒂酥脆片状。 它曾多次成为我“女孩晚餐”的一部分。

我使用冻干水果为甜点和饮料增添色彩。

我喜欢用冻干水果为自制甜点添加颜色和风味。 例如，为了制作粉色糖粉，我将 Trader Joe's 冻干草莓或覆盆子与标准糖粉混合。

有时，我也会将一把放入柠檬水、茶或苏打水中快速冲泡。

Trader Joe's 半甜巧克力块非常适合搭配饼干和布朗尼蛋糕。

每当我想用巧克力做饼干时，我都会选择 Trader Joe's 的半甜巧克力块。

它们非常适合混合到巧克力饼干面团和布朗尼蛋糕中。 我喜欢它们不太甜并且创造出非常均衡的甜点。

我喜欢用 Trader Joe's 的白奶酪酱来制作玉米片。

Trader Joe's 的白奶酪酱略带辣味，口感粘稠，是我喜欢搭配玉米片的口感。

我只是将玉米片、豆子、奶酪和奶酪放在衬有箔纸的平底锅上，然后将其放入烤箱直至融化，然后添加我选择的配料。

我手边总是备着一盒 Trader Joe’s 的巨型烤豆。

豆子最近确实复兴了，我很喜欢它。

我总是拿一盒 Trader Joe’s 的巨型番茄酱烤豆。 意大利卷豆奶油味浓郁，是吐司的完美底料。

我用橄榄油加热一些硬皮酸面团，在上面放上豆子和少许奶酪，然后将其放回烤面包机中。 一旦温暖，我喜欢在上面放上柠檬芝麻菜并享用。

阅读下一篇

Hetal Vasavada 是《商业内幕》的特约撰稿人。

  • 商人乔的日记
  • 烹饪
